title: Migrate queries
excerpt: Migrate your Sigma queries from Presto to Trino. We upgraded Sigma’s query infrastructure from [Presto v334](https://trino.io/docs/334/sql.html) to [Trino v414](https://trino.io/docs/414/sql/select.html). Most queries run faster as a result of the upgrade, but a few queries might error unexpectedly or produce results in different formats. Use the following suggestions to make your Sigma queries compatible with Trino v414. The `AMERICA/NEW_YORK` time zone is no longer valid in Trino v414. -- FAILED: Presto error: NOT_SUPPORTED: Time zone not supported: AMERICA/NEW_YORK c.created AT TIME ZONE 'AMERICA/NEW_YORK',
